scripts.build:dev: npm run build:ui && npm run build -w deedlit.dev
scripts.build:comfyhelper: npm run build:ui && npm run build -w deedlit.dev.comfyhelper
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build -w deedlit.dev && npm run build -w deedlit.dev.comfyhelper
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d --wait postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs
scripts.infra:stop: docker compose stop postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs
scripts.infra:restart: docker compose restart postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs
scripts.infra:ps: docker compose ps postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose logs -f postgres neo4j qdrant rustfs
